title: Gary Astleford
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Gary Astleford''' is a freelance writer and game designer who has contributed to products for the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]. Prior to being published, Gary ran the Rebellion, a web site devoted to continued support for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' by [[West End Games]].

Gary currently lives in California, where he works as a story designer for Carbine Studious.

==Bibliography==
===Books===
*[[Starships of the Galaxy (Saga Edition)|'' Starships of the Galaxy'']] - December 2007
*''[[Threats of the Galaxy]]'' - May 2008
*'' [[Scum and Villainy (sourcebook)|Scum and Villainy]]'' - November 2008
*''[[The Clone Wars Campaign Guide]]'' - January 2009
*''[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide]]'' - March 2009
*''[[Galaxy at War]]'' - September 2009
*''[[Galaxy of Intrigue]]'' - January 2010
*''[[Strongholds of Resistance]]'' - November 2015

===Articles===
*''[[Ord Vaxal: Prison Planet of the Empire]]'', ''[[Polyhedron 165]]'', [[December]] [[2003]]
*''[[A Reckoning of Wraiths]]'' (a [[Dawn of Defiance]] adventure)
*<!-- 2009-02-05 -->{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/CWenhancement1|text=''The Clone Wars'' Web Enhancement 1: Polis Massan}}
